appmesh.virtualgateway.virtualgatewaycli: An object that represents the virtual gateway's client's Transport Layer Security (TLS) certificate.

appmesh.virtualgateway.virtualgatewaycli.Description: An object that represents a local file certificate. The certificate must meet specific requirements and you must have proxy authorization enabled. For more information, see [ Transport Layer Security (TLS) ](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/app-mesh/latest/userguide/tls.html).
A reference to an object that represents a virtual gateway's client's Secret Discovery Service certificate.
